content: By integrating an ICM curiosity mechanism into the external memory interface of a Neural Turing Machine (NTM), we can build an autonomous agent that actively discovers and memorizes novel algorithmic patterns from unstructured interactive environments, rather than only learning fixed algorithms from pre-given training examples. 2025 advances in configurable ICM for swarm UAVs can be adapted to reward the NTM for exploring underutilized memory slots and untested input-output transformations, enabling open-ended algorithmic learning.
